name: WMS
summary: Warehouse Management System implementation covering inbound, putaway, picking and despatch. Integration testing has uncovered data-mapping issues with the ERP, and a vendor resource gap is now putting the September go-live at risk.
progress: Inbound and putaway processes configured in the test environment.
Barcode/label printing (EAN-13) validated end to end.
First round of integration testing with the ERP completed.
upcoming: Resolve transfer-order and stock-sync mapping defects.
Re-plan the integration test cycle with the vendor.
Confirm replacement for the departing integration lead.

risks.risk: ERP <-> WMS stock sync mapping defects.
risks.mitigation: Joint defect triage with the ERP team; daily stand-up until cleared.

risks.impact: Loss of context; slips the test cycle.
risks.mitigation: Escalated to vendor account manager; knowledge transfer sessions booked.

risks.risk: Go-live window collides with peak trading freeze.
risks.impact: Forced delay to Q4 if September is missed.
risks.mitigation: Hold a contingency slot and agree freeze exceptions early.
